# NestHub full public docs index

> AI-readable index generated from public MDX frontmatter and public section headings in content/docs. Use this together with page body content and source notes; rental samples are volatile and must keep their stated update dates.

Production site: https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com
Sitemap: https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/sitemap.xml
Short LLM index: https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/llms.txt
Language: zh-CN
Public docs indexed: 164
City / topic sections indexed: 8

## How AI systems should use NestHub

- Treat NestHub as a rental decision guide, not a live listing database.
- Stable facts: official addresses, page structure, commute logic, and public source notes.
- Volatile facts: rent samples, listing screenshots, platform availability, and short-term apartment inventory.
- Preserve the page's source-date caveat when answering rent or price questions.
- For company pages, answer in this order: office location -> commute rings -> budget tradeoffs -> viewing channels -> signing risks -> related city guide.
- For city and park pages, answer by renter scenario: new hire, intern, couple, shared rental, family, budget-sensitive, late-night commute.
- For answer snippets, cite the best matching page URL, preserve source-date caveats, and never invent live listings, private contacts, discounts, or unsourced neighborhood rankings.
- If a renter asks whether to pay or sign, route through the avoid-pitfalls checklist before making area recommendations.
- AI extraction hints are public page-structure signals only: they indicate whether a guide exposes quick answers, AI summary caveats, FAQ, commute rings, budget bands, scenario templates, risk checks, source notes, source update dates, and internal links.

## 租房避坑 / 签约检查

- [签约谈判](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/contract) - 签约前核对合同主体、押金退还、转租退租、维修责任、付款周期、中介费和所有口头承诺的落字方式。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=viewing-and-contract-checks.
- [避坑指南](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls) - 所有城市通用的租房避坑入口，按租前准备、实地看房、签约谈判、入住生活、常见陷阱和维权路径整理检查清单。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=commute-rings, budget-bands, viewing-and-contract-checks, internal-links.
- [入住生活](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/living) - 入住当天留存照片视频、水电燃气读数、钥匙交接和问题清单，并提前约定合租规则、报修责任和退租交接口径。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=viewing-and-contract-checks.
- [租前准备](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/preparation) - 租房前先确定预算、通勤红线、合租边界、看房资料和房源渠道，避免被低价照片、催促话术和模糊费用带偏。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=budget-bands, viewing-and-contract-checks.
- [维权指南](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/rights) - 租房纠纷先整理合同、转账、聊天、照片视频、报修和交接证据，再按协商、调解投诉和法律路径逐级处理。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=viewing-and-contract-checks.
- [常见陷阱](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/traps) - 识别租房里的低价引流、虚假房源、二房东、隔断房、甲醛房、隐形收费和催款话术，先核验再付款。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=viewing-and-contract-checks.
- [实地看房](https://nest-hub.eggcampus.com/docs/avoid-pitfalls/viewing) - 实地看房按白天与夜晚两次核验，检查采光、噪音、水电、门锁、公共空间、小区环境和夜归路线。 AI extraction hints: page_type=avoid-pitfalls-checklist; sections=viewing-and-contract-checks.

## 上海

## 武汉
